name: skill-router
description: File-aware skill auto-routing: a PostToolUse hook injects a directive to load the relevant best-practice skill(s) when you edit a matching file (PHP/Laravel/Blade, TS/JS, React/Vue/Inertia/Livewire, SQL, components, tests, Dockerfiles, OpenAPI), a SessionStart hook primes a repo-tailored skill index, and low-confidence content signals surface in a SessionEnd digest. Every relevant skill co-fires per edit (a11y alongside ui-ux); fail-open, once per skill per session.
